tree.name: De'Aaron Fox
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: SAS sent Collins/Jones/2025 CHI 1st to CHI; SAS sent Cissoko + 2025 2nd (CHI) + 2026 2nd + 2027 1st (SAS) + 2027 2nd + 2028 2nd (DEN) + 2031 1st (MIN) to SAC; CHI sent LaVine + 2028 2nd to SAC; SAC sent Huerter to CHI; SAC sent Fox + McLaughlin to SAS
tree.note: All-Star guard originally drafted 5th overall by Sacramento in 2017

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach Collins
assetsGivenUp.note: Center originally drafted 10th overall by Portland in 2017. Signed as free agent by SAS on 3yr/$22M deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: Tre Jones
assetsGivenUp.note: Point guard drafted 41st overall from Duke

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#16) via CHI
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: CHI sent Aminu, Thaddeus Young, 2022 2nd (swap), 2025 1st (CHI own), 2025 2nd (CHI own) to SAS for DeMar DeRozan in sign-and-trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2025 1st round pick, acquired in DeMar DeRozan sign-and-trade. Sent back to Chicago in Fox trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: DeMar DeRozan
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: SAS traded Kawhi Leonard, Danny Green and cash to TOR for DeRozan, Jakob Poeltl and a 2019 1st round pick (top-20 protected)
assetsGivenUp.note: All-Star guard originally drafted 9th overall by Toronto in 2009. Sign-and-traded to CHI in 2021.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kawhi Leonard
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: IND drafted Leonard 15th overall and traded him to SAS for George Hill
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward drafted 15th overall from San Diego State, immediately traded to SAS on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: Danny Green
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard originally drafted 46th overall by Cleveland in 2009. Waived, signed by SAS as free agent.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick via CHI
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from CHI in DeMar DeRozan sign-and-trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2025 2nd round pick, sent to Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: DeMar DeRozan
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: SAS traded Kawhi Leonard, Danny Green and cash to TOR for DeRozan, Jakob Poeltl and a 2019 1st round pick (top-20 protected)

assetsGivenUp.note: Forward drafted 15th overall from San Diego State, immediately traded to SAS on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: Danny Green

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick (conditional CHO 1st did not convey)
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally a conditional 2025 CHO 1st round pick owed to SAC that did not convey; converted to 2026 and 2027 2nd round picks

assetsGivenUp.note: Originally a conditional 2025 CHO 1st round pick owed to SAC that did not convey; converted to 2026 and 2027 2nd round picks

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: BOS sent Hernangomez + cash to SAS; DEN sent Bol Bol + Dozier to BOS; DEN sent cash + 2028 2nd (DEN own) to SAS; SAS sent Forbes to DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's 2028 2nd round pick (conditional), sent to Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: Bryn Forbes
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard signed as free agent by SAS. Re-signed Aug 2021. Traded to DEN in 3-team deal Jan 2022.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 1st Round Pick via MIN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: SAS traded Rob Dillingham (8th pick) to MIN for 2030 1st swap + 2031 1st (MIN own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Minnesota's 2031 1st round pick, acquired from Timberwolves in Rob Dillingham draft-night trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Rob Dillingham
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 8th overall, immediately traded to Minnesota for 2030 swap + 2031 1st
